title: 9 Claude Code Plugins to Build 10x Faster
summary: Austin Marchese reviews 9 Claude Code plugins designed to accelerate development workflows, reduce AI output quality issues, and optimize token spending. The featured tools include web scraping (Exa, Firecrawl), design assistance (Anthropic Frontend Design), security guidance, and model switching utilities like Morph.
